view.title: View Summoned Companion {id}
view.reinstallNote: You can reinstall from the left guild menu
view.cpanelNote: Control panel needs to be installed on a clean base enchantment layer with no modifications. If there is any data it will be lost.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome raven?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome raven has been resent. Check your messenger raven perch.

order.title: Summon a Companion
order.rootPasswordNote: Note: Secret passphrase must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, and a special character.
order.agreeToTerms: Agree to the guild charter terms
order.subscriptionRenewal: The subscription will automatically renew after {period} at {cost} until abandoned.
order.tosAcknowledgment: By checking this rune, you acknowledge that you are purchasing a subscription that automatically renews and is billed to the coin purse you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the guild portal, select the active service and click the Abandon link or send a raven to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Guild Charter and Privacy Scroll. By checking the rune and clicking Place My Commission below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Guild Charter and Privacy Scroll.
order.tosAgree: I have read the terms above and I agree.

buyIp.title: Additional Stronghold Coordinates Addon for your Summoned Companion

buyHdSpace.title: Additional Summoned Companion Arcane Vault Space
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Minimum 1 up to 100GB additional arcane vault space can be commissioned

changeRootPassword.title: Change Summoned Companion Master Access Code
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Secret Passphrase and Confirm Passphrase do not match

changeTimezone.title: Change {module} Realm Time Zone
changeTimezone.importantNote1: You should power down your {module} completely before changing the realm time zone.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: Summoned Companion will be Powered OFF and restarted during the process.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: The realm time zone on this page will always default to America/New_York regardless of what your stronghold is set to.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Change Webuzo Admin Secret Passphrase
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Secret Passphrase and Confirm Passphrase do not match

reinstallOs.title: Reinstall Base Enchantment Layer
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Re-inscribing the base enchantment layer will destroy all data.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Before re-inscribing the base enchantment layer, please take a backup to the Dragon's Hoard.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: I wish to re-inscribe the Base Enchantment Layer!

resetPassword.title: Reset Summoned Companion Master Access Code
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Windows secret passphrase reset will result in an unclean shutdown. Please consider this a last resort option. Verify in VNC that no enchantments are currently running. If an enchantment is running VNC will show: Windows is applying enchantments, do not shut down. Shutting down in this state can result in an unbootable stronghold.
resetPassword.confirmReset: I wish to Reset the Master Access Code!

reverseDns.title: Reverse DNS
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Changes to reverse DNS take up to an hour to show up.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Available only on the Windows Platform. Remote desktop is a quick and convenient way to connect to a summoned companion's desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: The Administrator secret passphrase must first be set on the Summoned Companion before you can use remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Connect with VNC or HTML5 VNC to set your initial passphrase.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: For a remote desktop tutorial click
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC allows you to connect to the summoned companion's desktop. VNC can be run in the browser or as a stand-alone client. Your stronghold coordinates must be granted access before the connection can be established.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Grant Your Stronghold Coordinates access to VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Please wait 2 minutes for the action to complete.
vnc.vncClientNote: You can also loot one of the many VNC clients available in the realm. We recommend TightVNC. Connect using your Summoned Companion stronghold coordinates. Secret passphrase is not required after your remote stronghold coordinates have been granted in step 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: To connect using HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client that runs well in any modern scrying mirror including mobile mirrors (iOS and Android).

setupVnc.title: Setup VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: Stronghold Coordinates to grant VNC access
setupVnc.grantAccess: Grant VNC Access to Stronghold Coordinates

insertCd.insertIso: Insert ISO Spell Tome In CDROM Drive
insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Enter a CD or DVD ISO URL

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Dragon's Hoard backups will only work with default partitioning.
backup.confirmBackup: Do you truly wish to take a Dragon's Hoard backup?
backup.noBackup: No Dragon's Hoard backup currently exists

restore.offlineNote: Your stronghold will be offline while it replaces all your current files with those in the Dragon's Hoard. Please contact guild support with any questions.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Enter Guild Login Passphrase to Validate Restore.
restore.confirmRestore: Do you truly wish to restore this Dragon's Hoard backup?

trafficUsage.title: Data Throughput / Traffic Usage
trafficUsage.billingNote: This is not used for gold ledger calculations and is an estimate only based on your virtual network cards.

slices.title: Upgrade / Downgrade Slices
slices.slicesNote: Up to 32 Slices can be bound to a Summoned Companion.
slices.proratedNote: Prorated gold amount to be paid now.
slices.recurringBillNote: Recurring gold inscription will change by this much
slices.newInvoiceNote: New gold due notices will cost this much
slices.confirmLabel: Aye, I wish to do this.
